title: ZA - Better amethyst
body:
This mod makes amethyst a lot more useful. It adds new tools, blocks and mechanics.

_You can craft all of the new blocks in the stone cutter. Ot just use JEI bc i cant put all of the new block recepies here._


<details>
<summary>Crafting recepies</summary>
  
![Amethyst tools craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001b5a4d74cb9325cbd6a731cfc8c33a9ed7bf4b.png)
![Amethyst lamp craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deddc8995fb44a3086190f2f05583c44939df5f9.png)
![Resonant expirience crystall craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c649d784711c97fb180d986aef2698ab1b4ce14.png)
![Amethyst upgrade duplication](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c71f3dab5620e095b498e9e04b3d070d4e63ab9.png)
![repair core craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea32cd9fdc4976ceff1b607c7ea65719facbe2be.png)
![rune craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f7702590b9f38dfd1712ac6750a289c04e0b88f.png)

</details>



## TOOLS
Forged from gold and enhanced with the power of crystals, Amethyst tools are a direct upgrade to your golden gear.

**Crafting**: Upgrade golden tools in a _Smithing Table_ using an **_Amethyst Upgrade_** and an _**Amethyst Shard**_.

Stats:

**Durability**: 320 (Between Iron and Diamond)

**Efficiency**: 11 (Faster than Netherite)

Finding the Template: Seek out Amethyst Upgrade Smithing Templates in Ancient Cities, Desert Pyramids, Treasures and Ruined Portals. Duplicate them just like Netherite upgrades.

## RUNES

Harness the resonant energy of amethyst to create ancient runes that emit powerful auras.

**Area of Effect**: Affects all creatures in a 32-block radius.

Smart Filtering: Use Redstone Lamps! Place a lamp above and below the rune to affect players and other entities or leave the rune to affect monsters. Perfect for creating safe zones or mob farms!

**Customizable Effects**: The magic is in the offering. Put an item into the rune to change its effect:


<details>
<summary>Effects</summary>

- Ghast Tear -> Regeneration I
- Rabbit Foot -> Jump Boost II
- Pufferfish -> Water Breathing I
- Magma Cream -> Fire Resistance
- Phantom Membrane -> Slow Falling I
- Sugar -> Speed I
- Golden Carrot -> Night Vision
- Bread -> Saturation I
- Blaze Powder -> Sets entities on fire
- Snowball -> Slowness I
- Spider Eye -> Poison I
- Fermented Spider Eye -> Weakness I


</details>


## Repair core

A powerful item that uses stored energy to repair your gear automatically.

**Mass Repair**: Repair up to 4 tools or armor pieces simultaneously.

**Large Capacity**: Holds 3000 charge (1 charge = 1 durability point).

**Visual Charge Indicator**: Its texture changes based on its charge level, so you always know how much power is left.

**Rechargeable**: Fuel your Core with these items:


<details>
<summary>Items</summary>

- Lapis Lazuli: +20
- Raw Gold: +150
- Golden Ingot: +200
- Amethyst Shard: +300
- Amethyst Block: +20
- Diamond: +1200

</details>



## Resonant experience crystal

The heart of your enchanting, xp farms and xp trading setup. This advanced item allows you to store and utilize your experience levels. 

**Storage**: Right-click to deposit or withdraw all your experience levels at once. Holds up to _10.000 xp points_. No more losing levels upon death!

**Tool repairing**: Right-click it with no levels to withdraw all xp, and repair your mending armour and tools(if you hold your tools in hand).

**Visual indication**: Crystal's durability shows how many xp points it holds. You can get exact number by pressing f3+H for advanced tooltips.

**Crafting**: Forged from a rare Echo Shard, surrounded by Amethyst Shards.

## New decorative blocks

Expand your building palette with a suite of beautiful new amethyst blocks!
Craft **Shiny Amethyst bricks** and **Amethyst Bricks** from your amethyst blocks, then turn them into:

- Slabs
- Stairs
- Pillars
- Chiseled
- Tiles

Also you can craft new amethyst lamp, wich, when powered, increases its light level over time.
